Estate Plan Portfolio

Protecting Your Digital Legacy

Your trust should include full authority over digital assets, cloud storage, cryptocurrency, and online accounts. Use this checklist to ensure your trustee can access and administer everything your estate holds in the digital world. Get with TWLS Group to review your current estate plan and make sure it has the most up to date language.
